# Polymux

> Polymux captures user journeys as reusable Flows, runs them through platform runners, and verifies expected behaviour with Checks, Artifacts, and replayable evidence. Built for teams who need reliable, observable end-to-end testing.

## Product

- [Home](https://polymux.com/): Hero, features, pricing, and reviews.
- [Pricing](https://polymux.com/pricing): Per-workspace pricing for Free, Pro, Max, and Enterprise plans.
- [Install Apps](https://polymux.com/install-apps): Download Polymux for macOS, Windows, and Linux.

## Docs

- [Documentation](https://polymux.com/documentation): Guides for installing, configuring, and building agents and workflows.
- [API Reference](https://polymux.com/api-reference): REST endpoints for agents, workflows, sessions, vault, and storage.

## Community

- [Community](https://polymux.com/community): Hub for shared workflows, support, and discussion.
- [Forum](https://polymux.com/forum): Ask questions, share builds, and troubleshoot with other users.
- [Blog](https://polymux.com/blog): Updates, deep-dives, and case studies.

## Company

- [About Us](https://polymux.com/about-us): Mission, team, and story.
- [Contact](https://polymux.com/contact): Sales, partnerships, support, and press.

## Legal

- [Privacy Policy](https://polymux.com/privacy-policy)
- [Terms of Service](https://polymux.com/terms-of-service)
- [Cookie Policy](https://polymux.com/cookie-policy)
